info.name: Sneaky Sheep
info.attribution:
Layout, board, cards, design, and coding by Jonathan Cox (email: Contact@GettingGames.com for inquiries) and released to the Public Domain under CC0.

The dog icon is from Google Noto Color Emoji and is available under the SIL Open Font License.

The sheep icon by Bakunetsu Kaito is available at https://thenounproject.com/icon/sheep-8273757/ under the Noun Project License.

The library image by LawDawg96 is released to the Public Domain under CC0.
info.description: Create the best sheep farm by adding sheep and building a fence around your farm as you go.
info.similarAwards:
1991 Spiel des Jahres Recommended
1991 Deutscher Spiele Preis Best Family/Adult Game 2nd Place
info.helpText:
Players take seats. Press Setup button to begin. A random player (indicated by a button next to the seat area) is chosen to start.

To complete setup, drag a sheep card to the holder in your seat area with a question mark. This will reveal the value of the sheep only to you. Taking turns, each player drags their sheep to an empty green space on the board.

On your turn and according to the rules, manually move sheep and fences by dragging them and flip sheep to show their value by clicking them. At the end of your turn, click the Current Turn button.

At the end of the game, click on the "0 vp" area at your seat to enter your score.

fields.label: Check this box and click the green button to reset the game.
Choose cursor style for all players.

fields.label: Remove this player from their seat
Type the number of points gained or lost. Put a - before the number to lose points.

pc8o.text:
ON TURN CHOOSE ONE ACTION:
• Place Sheep
• Flip Sheep
• Move Sheep then flip
• Place Fence

pc9o.text: IF FLIPPED SHEEP IS BLACK, TAKE TWO MORE ACTIONS
